__schema.__comment: Omit any field not relevant to the place described
__schema.common_name: string; Short name, should be, or redirect to, the wiki page for the country
__schema.name: string; Full name of the country
__schema.ruler: string|list of string; In-lore ruler of the country
__schema.ruler_link: string; If the name ruler of the country doesn’t redirect to the correct wiki page, put the link here
__schema.date_founded: list of 3 numbers: [year, month, day] as of the gregorian calendar
__schema.date_dissolved: list of 3 numbers: [year, month, day] as of the gregorian calendar
__schema.reason_dissolved: string|bool; the reason the nation was dissolved, or the bolean true if it was dissolved without any known reason
__schema.capital: string; Name of the official "Capital Subdivision"
__schema.banner: string; pagename of the file containing the banner, File: namespace implied
__schema.ung: "member"|"observer"|"former"; current membership status in the United Ŋations
__schema.ung_joined: list of 3 numbers: [year, month, day] as of the gregorian calendar
__schema.ung_demoted: list of 3 numbers: [year, month, day] as of the gregorian calendar; date on which the country became an observer
__schema.ung_left: list of 3 numbers: [year, month, day] as of the gregorian calendar; date on which the country has left the United Ŋations
__schema.not_ngation: bool; This place isn’t a sovereign nation
__schema.condominium: list of string; This place is a condominium, list of all the `code2`s of all the places having a stake here. Use a single member list for territories who are dependent on some other place, but otherwise have their own code. Implies not_ngation: true.
__schema.notes: string; extra notes on recognition, special status or anything else
__schema.reserved: string; if this field is present, only include `code2` and `code3`. Indicates a code reserved a place that could use a top level code but currently doesn't

Not recognized by [[Aylongam]], [[B’hiy’aj Dchâjâ]] (which basically doesn’t recognise anyone anyway), [[Corneria]], [[Dróstsiśtsi]], [[Enkavak]], [[Hummland]], [[Imerchal]], the [[Kingdom of Kyaw Cen]], [[Pua]] and [[Pihi]]. Note that the Evil Scamming Country does not recognize any of these Ŋations in return. The [[Realm of Madness]] once decuple recognized the Evil Scamming Country to nullify the unrecognition of all the above ŋations, but this is invalid since it dissolved.
